_comment: Generated-style leaf registry (hand-authored prototype). jtbd_id + persona are CANONICAL Ritual taxonomy values from Ritual's source of truth, each verified against the live classifier. Validated by scripts/validate-leaves.mjs against canonical/jtbd-allowlist.json. Never hand-invent jtbd_id.

leaves.title: Define product positioning
leaves.description: Clarify how the product should be positioned in the market — the audience, the alternative, and the wedge — grounded in real signal.

leaves.title: Create launch brief
leaves.description: Shape the go-to-market launch brief for a release — audience, message, channels, and what success looks like.

leaves.title: Design growth experiment
leaves.description: Design a well-formed growth experiment — hypothesis, metric, and guardrails — scoped to the real constraints.
